# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Kong Gateway production configuration
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Database
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
database = postgres
pg_host = postgres
pg_port = 5432
pg_database = kong
pg_user = kong
pg_password = changeme
pg_schema = public
pg_ssl = on
pg_ssl_verify = on
pg_max_concurrent_queries = 0
pg_semaphore_timeout = 60000
pg_timeout = 5000

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Proxy
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
proxy_listen = 0.0.0.0:8000 reuseport backlog=16384, 0.0.0.0:8443 http2 ssl reuseport backlog=16384

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Admin API
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
admin_listen = 127.0.0.1:8001, 127.0.0.1:8444 ssl

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Nginx / worker tuning
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
nginx_worker_processes = auto
nginx_daemon = on
mem_cache_size = 256m
client_body_buffer_size = 16k
client_max_body_size = 10m
upstream_keepalive_max_requests = 100000
upstream_keepalive_idle_timeout = 60
upstream_keepalive_pool_size = 512

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Logging
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
log_level = notice
proxy_access_log = /dev/stdout
proxy_error_log = /dev/stderr
admin_access_log = /dev/stdout
admin_error_log = /dev/stderr

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Headers
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
headers = latency_tokens, X-Kong-Request-Id

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# SSL
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ssl_cipher_suite = intermediate
trusted_ips = 127.0.0.1,::1
real_ip_header = X-Forwarded-For
real_ip_recursive = on

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Misc
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
anonymous_reports = off
router_flavor = traditional
role = traditional
prefix = /usr/local/kong
